articles.title: U.S. citizen working for humanitarian organization in Congo tests positive for Ebola, CDC says - CBS News
articles.description: The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention said the outbreak is the fastest-growing Ebola outbreak recorded on the continent.
articles.content: A U.S. citizen working for a humanitarian organization in Congo has tested positive for the Ebola virus, the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said on Friday, as the Central African cou… [+2241 chars]
